mapper.select: SELECT code, name, length, width, height, color, image FROM cabinet_type
SELECT code, name, length, width, height, color, image FROM cabinet_type WHERE code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cabinet_type (code, name, length, width, height, color, image) VALUES (#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{length,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{width,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{height,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE cabinet_type SET name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, length = #{length,jdbcType=INTEGER}, width = #{width,jdbcType=INTEGER}, height = #{height,jdbcType=INTEGER}, color = #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
